moves.name: Standing Light Punch
moves.notes: 連打キャンセル対応
moves.notesEn: Can be rapid canceled

moves.name: Standing Heavy Punch
moves.notes: 強制立ち効果
moves.notesEn: Forces the opponent into a standing position

moves.name: Standing Heavy Kick
moves.notes: 空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウンパニッシュカウンター時に膝崩れダウンに+36F空中パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛び時間延長
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentProduces a crumple stun for 36 frames when the attack lands as a Punish CounterJuggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

moves.name: Crouching Light Punch
moves.notes: 連打キャンセル対応
moves.notesEn: Can be rapid canceled

moves.name: Crouching Light Kick
moves.notes: 連打キャンセル対応
moves.notesEn: Can be rapid canceled

moves.name: Crouching Medium Punch
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ中P（ストレート）
moves.notes: 空振り時硬直2F増加
moves.notesEn: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: Crouching Medium Kick
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ中K（くるぶしキック）

moves.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ強P（突き上げアッパー）
moves.notes: キャンセルは持続の1F目がヒットした時のみ強制立ち効果
moves.notesEn: Can only be canceled on the 1st active frame if the attack hitsForces the opponent into a standing position

moves.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ強K（回転足払い）
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時ダウン時間増加、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

moves.name: Jumping Light Kick
moves.notes: めくり性能
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack properties

moves.name: Jumping Medium Punch
moves.nameJa: ジャンプ中P（すくい突き）
moves.notes: 空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: Jumping Medium Kick
moves.notes: めくり性能
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack properties

moves.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
moves.nameJa: ジャンプ強P（ストレート）
moves.notes: 空中カウンター/パニッシュカウンター時叩きつけダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
moves.nameJa: ジャンプ強K（跳び前蹴り）

moves.name: Collarbone Breaker
moves.notes: ※初段が空振り時のみ2段目が中段判定
moves.notesEn: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

moves.name: Short Uppercut
moves.notes: キャンセルは持続の1F目がヒットした時のみ強制立ち効果
moves.notesEn: Can only be canceled on the 1st active frame if the attack hitsForces the opponent into a standing position

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.notes: 1段目強制立ち効果2段目空中ヒット時床バウンド
moves.notesEn: First attack forces the opponent into a standing positionSecond attack produces a ground bound on a mid-air hit

moves.name: Whirlwind Kick
moves.notes: ※空中竜巻旋風脚(OD版を含む)でキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: * Can be canceled with an Aerial Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku (Overdrive version included)

moves.name: High Double Strike
moves.notes: ※ヒット時、電刃錬気でのみキャンセル可能クラシック操作:↓+P、モダン操作:↓＋攻撃
moves.notesEn: *Can only be canceled into Denjin Charge on hit.Classic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

moves.name: Fuwa Triple Strike(3)
moves.notes: ※ヒット時、電刃錬気でのみキャンセル可能クラシック操作:↓+P、モダン操作:↓＋攻撃
moves.notesEn: *Can only be canceled into Denjin Charge on hit.Classic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

moves.name: L Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-14F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵7-34F　空中判定※持続の3F目以降は個別ダメージ（800）
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 7 - 34* After the 3rd active frame this move deals only 800 damage

moves.name: M Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-9F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵8-44F　空中判定※持続の3F目以降は個別ダメージ（800）
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 8 - 44* After the 3rd active frame this move deals only 800 damage

moves.name: H Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-8F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵9-49F　空中判定※持続の2F目以降は個別ダメージ（800）
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 9 - 49.* After the 2nd active frame this move deals only 800 damage.

moves.name: OD Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-8F　完全無敵8-51F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 8 - 51.

moves.name: L Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku
moves.notes: 5-28F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 28.

moves.name: M Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku
moves.notes: 8-41F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 8 - 41.

moves.name: H Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku
moves.notes: 10-61F 空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 10 - 61.

moves.name: OD Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku
moves.notes: 5-47F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 47.

moves.name: H High Blade Kick
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛び時間延長
moves.notesEn: Juggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

moves.name: L Hashogeki
moves.notes: カウンター/パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛びダウン飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: M Hashogeki
moves.notes: カウンター/パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛びダウン飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: H Hashogeki
moves.notes: 飛び道具相殺判定あり（2回）
moves.notesEn: Clashes with projectiles (Twice)

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]Hashogeki
moves.notes: 飛び道具相殺判定あり（2回）
moves.notesEn: Clashes with projectiles (Twice)

moves.name: OD Hashogeki
moves.notes: 飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.notesEn: Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]OD Hashogeki
moves.notes: ヒット時に膝崩れダウンに＋39飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.notesEn: Produces a crumple stun for 39 frames when the attack lands.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: Denjin Charge
moves.notes: 51F目で電刃錬気を1つストック（1つまでストック可能）波動拳、波掌撃、真空波動拳、真波掌撃の性能が強化される
moves.notesEn: Denjin Charge stock added on the 51st frame. Only 1 Denjin Charge stock can be held at a time.Hadoken, Hashogeki, Shinku Hadoken, and Shin Hashogeki's properties are enhanced when a Denjin Charge is held.

moves.name: SA1 Shinku Hadoken
moves.notes: 1-8F　打撃・投げに対して無敵カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ30％
moves.notesEn: Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%.

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]SA1 Shinku Hadoken
moves.notes: 1-8F　打撃・投げに対して無敵カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ30％
moves.notesEn: Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%.

moves.name: SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv1）
moves.notes: 1-13F 完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 13.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv2）
moves.notes: 1-9F　完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv3）
moves.notes: 1-9F 完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv1）
moves.notes: 1-13F 完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 13.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv2）
moves.notes: 1-9F 完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: [Denjin Charge]SA2 Shin Hashogeki（Lv3）
moves.notes: 1-9F 完全無敵ボタンをホールドする事で性能変化7F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動39F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない最低保障ダメージ40％
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

moves.name: SA3 Shin Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-16F 完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.* Can only be canceled into from special moves.

moves.name: CA Shin Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-16F 完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.* Can only be canceled into from special moves.

moves.name: Shoulder Throw
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Somersault Throw
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Backward Dash
moves.notes: 1-15F 投げ無敵
moves.notesEn: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

moves.name: Drive Impact: Shingeki
moves.nameJa: ドライブインパクト（震撃）
moves.notes: 1-27F　 アーマー判定（2回）ヒットバックでステージ端に到達すると壁やられが発生パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化・地上ヒット膝崩れ・空中ヒット吹き飛び時間増加・SAゲージ3000増加
moves.notesEn: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Chest Strike
moves.nameJa: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル（胸尖打ち）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-22F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible from frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Chest Strike
moves.nameJa: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（胸尖打ち）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-20F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可硬直部分はガードのみ可動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.notesEn: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: Perfect Parry (strike)
moves.notes: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Perfect Parry (projectile)
moves.nameJa: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
moves.notes: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する暗転演出が入らないジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Parry Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: パリィドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転10F※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: Cancel Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転9F※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
